Source.Name: difftastic
Source.Summary: A structural diff that understands syntax.
Source.Description: Difftastic is a CLI diff tool that compares files based on their syntax, not line-by-line. Difftastic produces accurate diffs that are easier for humans to read.

Package.Name: difftastic
Package.Summary: A structural diff that understands syntax.
Package.Description: Difftastic is a CLI diff tool that compares files based on their syntax, not line-by-line. Difftastic produces accurate diffs that are easier for humans to read.
